capabilities_used.evidence: 图1、图3、图4、图5、图8都明显叠加布林带；他在 2024-09-30 明说“$BTC 4H hidden bullish divergence on lower BB dip with volume”，2025-07-31 又说“daily BB pinch to 1H pinbar and reversal”，说明 BB 收口、下轨回踩、带宽扩张是核心框架。

大量推文围绕回踩均线后的延续：2024-06-30“daily strength flirting with first close above EMA 8 since June 7”，2024-06-30“trying 4H SMA 50 again from underside”，2025-05-30“Price has held last few attempts”对 DMA20 的反应；图3、图8都在观察价格对 20/50/200 均线的回踩与再起。
2026-02-28“$BTC 4H reclaim as daily works on a bullish pinbar”，2025-05-30“first 4H MA 200 tag”，2024-09-30“now throwback to DMA 200”，他反复把收复/失守 200MA、20DMA、8EMA 当作趋势切换确认。
2024-11-30“$FET clean break of I-HNS neckbase line on daily”，2024-01-31“$BTC 4H can also be viewed as I-HNS continuation testing neck-base”，以及图4 在 4H 上直接画出多段圆弧底后冲击颈线区域，说明他对 I-HNS/neck-base 的运用非常成熟。
2025-09-30 直接发“Double Bottom Reversal For the Trading Encyclopedia”；图4 的中段结构也有双底/圆弧底组合特征，属于他教学体系里常见的底部反转模板。
2026-04-01“$TRX prob forms a handle for cup and handle continuation here on daily”；图4 有明显杯状回升后在颈线下做小幅整理再冲击阻力，符合他常见的 continuation 视角。
2026-02-28“daily works on a bullish pinbar with 3.5 hours left in session”，2025-07-31“1H now starting to test that pinbar's range”；他不只识别 pinbar，还会跟踪其后续对 pinbar 区间的测试。
2024-12-31“$BTC monthly candle (light volume spinning top) explained here - and it’s significance -”，2025-02-28“Medium body > large body > spinning top”，说明他把 spinning top / 小实体犹豫K作为关键拐点阅读的一部分。
2024-04-30“needs to hold here on daily or we likely see 52k range”，2024-07-30“$BTC consolidating like a champ”，2026-02-28“Price still ranging and highly vulnerable”；图1、图6、图7 都是明确的箱体支撑阻力框。
图1 直接框出上沿与下沿区间，强调守住下沿否则下看；2026-04-03“$SOL Solana testing bottom of daily range”；他常在区间边缘给出 hold / fail 的条件判断，而不是中间位置追价。
2026-01-31“Remember, we don’t buy oversold, we buy when RSI leaves oversold territory”；这是标准的先等止跌确认、避免直接接飞刀。
2026-01-31“we don’t buy oversold, we buy when RSI leaves oversold territory”，2026-01-31 又说“price will bottom around the time weekly RSI gets to 24 or 25 area”；他不是机械抄 RSI，而是等 RSI 离开极端区域。
2024-09-30“$BTC 4H hidden bullish divergence on lower BB dip with volume”；虽然 seed 里是普通 bullish divergence，但他显然把 RSI 背离作为次级确认工具。
2025-02-28“$BTC 4H RSI working on hidden bearish divergence re: higher highs vs price”；说明他也用 bearish divergence 辅助识别短线 rollover。

2025-03-31“Refusing to take a small loss will often lead to the opportunity to refuse to take a big loss.”，2024-03-31“If the reason you entered your trade no longer exists then a reason to exit your trade now does.”；这是他最稳定、最高频的人设与交易原则。
2025-08-31“cut your position size by 75%”；他的公开建议明显偏向先活下来、先缩仓，再谈抓大行情。
2024-03-31“on track for highest weekly candle close in history”，2024-01-31“4H now re-pressing range highs”，说明他会明确区分趋势延续环境与区间环境，并在强势结构中偏向 continuation 解读。
图6、图7 是日线下降通道/下降趋势线压制后的向上尝试；2025-02-28“body progression hinting at roll over”，2025-03-31“fresh 4H lows👀”，他对下跌趋势中的弱反弹与 rollover 也有清晰定义。
2025-09-30“$BTC dominance creeping higher”；会看 BTC.D，但明显不是其主交易框架核心。
2024-01-31 发过“$DXY markup”，2026-03-30“$DXY and $WTI same price”；他会观察宏观相关品种，但更多像背景板，不是主要触发器。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Hidden RSI Divergence
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use hidden bullish or bearish RSI divergence as a continuation signal within an existing trend, often in combination with Bollinger Band location and price structure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在既有趋势中，用 RSI 隐性看多/看空背离作为延续信号，常与布林带位置和价格结构联合使用。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-30“$BTC 4H hidden bullish divergence on lower BB dip with volume”；2025-02-28“$BTC 4H RSI working on hidden bearish divergence”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Outside/Inside Bar Context Read
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Interpret daily or 4H outside bars, inside bars, and 2x inside sequences in relation to nearby pivots, trend state, and follow-through rather than as isolated candles.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将日线或4H的 outside bar、inside bar、2x inside 与附近枢轴位、趋势状态和后续跟随结合解读，而不是孤立看单根K线。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-04-29“needs above 64.5k for daily outside”；2024-09-29“$BTC closing in on 2x inside daily”；2025-03-31“now working on daily outside bar with 84.5k pivot above”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Throwback Retest
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a breakout or reclaim, wait for price to revisit the breakout zone, channel line, or major moving average and judge whether it holds cleanly before positioning for continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 突破或收复后，不追第一脚，而是等价格回踩突破位、通道线或关键均线，确认守住后再做延续。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-07-30“another throwback to 66k range”；2024-05-31“another throwback on daily”；2025-04-30“nice response to the throwback”；图4、图5 都是在颈线/箱体上沿附近等待回踩确认。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Candle Body Progression
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Read the progression from strong expansion candles to smaller bodies or spinning tops as evidence of momentum exhaustion or rollover risk near decision levels.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在关键位附近观察 K 线从扩张实体到缩小实体、再到 spinning top 的递进，作为动能衰竭或转弱信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-28“Medium body > large body > spinning top”；2025-02-28“Note body progression”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Neck-Base Priority
new_capabilities_proposed.description: In head-and-shoulders and inverse head-and-shoulders structures, prioritize the quality and clarity of the neck-base over perfect symmetry of shoulders.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在头肩/头肩底结构中，更重视颈基线是否清晰、可交易，而不是肩部是否完美对称。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-01-31“Shoulder structure is often flexible, though the most important feature is a well defined neck-base”

personal_quirks.quote: “If the reason you entered your trade no longer exists then a reason to exit your trade now does.”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 入场逻辑失效就立刻退出，不为仓位找借口。

personal_quirks.quote: “Refusing to take a small loss will often lead to the opportunity to refuse to take a big loss.”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先接受小亏，避免把普通错误养成灾难性亏损。

personal_quirks.quote: “Remember, we don’t buy oversold, we buy when RSI leaves oversold territory”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不直接抄超卖，要等动能真正拐头离开极端区域再做。

personal_quirks.quote: “Why would they? Good charts are strong, bad charts are weak. Avoid the weak stuff. Don't worry about what "alts" are doing, focus on your individual charts. Don't get distracted”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先筛强图，弱图直接回避；交易对象靠个体结构，不靠题材叙事。

personal_quirks.quote: “When you are so excited about your trade that you take a screen shot to send to your buddy, that is probably when you should sell.”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 情绪最亢奋时通常接近兑现点，而不是加仓点。

unique_traits: 他和很多泛宏观或链上叙事型交易员不同，核心是极度纯粹的图表派：布林带、均线、K线实体结构、颈线/箱体/throwback，形成一套很稳定的价格行为语言。其次，他不是只讲形态名称，而是特别强调形态所在的位置、均线关系、是否回踩确认、以及 candle body progression 这类细节。最后，他有很强的教育者属性，会把 setup 拆成可复用 playbook，但风险控制语气始终压过预测语气。

high_conviction_phrases: highest weekly candle close in history
